random.desc: Returns a random integer value between `min` and `max`

random2.desc: Returns a random integer value between `-mask` and `+mask`

frandom.desc: Returns a random floating point value between `min` and `max`

ACS_ExecuteWithResult.desc: Runs a script and uses its return value

ACS_NamedExecuteWithResult.desc: Runs a named script and uses its return value

CallACS.desc: Runs a named script and uses its return value

ceilingz.desc: Z height of the ceiling above the calling actor

floorz.desc: Z height of the floor underneath the calling actor

velx.desc: Actor's velocity along the absolute X axis

momx.desc: Actor's velocity along the absolute X axis

vely.desc: Actor's velocity along the absolute Y axis

momy.desc: Actor's velocity along the absolute Y axis

velz.desc: Actor's velocity along the absolute Z axis

momz.desc: Actor's velocity along the absolute Z axis

alpha.desc: The Alpha value of the Actor

args.desc: Arguments passed to the thing special

health.desc: How much health the Actor has left

special.desc: ID of the special currently assigned to this actor

tidtohate.desc: TID of the current assigned target

waterlevel.desc: How "submerged" the actor is in a `Transfer_Heights` or 3D floor water pool
